evals.prompt: Check what profiler tools are installed and tell me the missing install steps. Do not install anything.
evals.expected_output: Reports existing nsys/sqlite3/Tracy tools, lists only missing install steps, and does not run privileged or mutating commands.
assertions: Uses non-mutating version/path checks before any install guidance
Separates nsys, sqlite3, capture/capture-release/tracy-capture, csvexport, and update/tracy-update
Says privileged package installs, symlinks, and sysctl changes require approval
Mentions container-safe fallback when perf/GPU counter permissions are unavailable

evals.prompt: I am inside a container with perf_event_paranoid=4 and GPU counter permissions blocked. How should I set up profiling tools?
evals.expected_output: Explains that CPU sampling/GPU metrics may be unavailable, recommends safe tool checks/install steps, and points to container-safe profiling mode rather than forcing sysctl changes.
assertions: Does not instruct the agent to force sysctl changes inside the container
Mentions nsys can still collect NVTX/CUDA/Vulkan traces without CPU sampling
Approval-gates host-level sysctl or package changes
